scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:dist
scripts.build:dist: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets/css dist/blog && cp index.html how-it-works.html about.html contact.html blog.html 404.html staticwebapp.config.json dist/ && cp assets/css/output.css dist/assets/css/ && cp -r assets/images dist/assets/images && cp blog/*.html dist/blog/
